summary: Outstanding 24‑bit fob transfer delivers crystal‑clear sound, though the concert itself isn’t described in the review.
review: The reviewer raves about the 24‑bit fob source, calling it the best listening experience they’ve had of any Dead show and praising the archivists’ skill. No specific comments are made about the musical performance or setlist, so the quality of the show itself remains unknown.

ai_rating.rationale: A single 5‑star review highlights exceptional recording quality, but provides no information on the performance; weighting the unknown show quality lowers the overall rating to a solid four stars.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewer describes the 24‑bit fob as the best listening experience, implying very clear and detailed sound with no noted flaws.

show_quality.setlist_flow: No comments on set structure or performance quality were provided.
